---
title: "The apple of discord - by Charlotte Mary Yonge(1864)"
year: 1864
slug: "apple of discord"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


### Online text of*The apple of discord*  
(Google scan of a Bodleian copy)  

### [Click here to read or download](https://www.google.co.uk/books/edition/The_apple_of_discord_By_the_author_of_Th/4AQJAAAAQAAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&pg=PT4&printsec=frontcover#v=onepage&q&f=false)
